title: Trimurti Films sues Aditya Dhar’s B62 Studios over use of Rang De Lal song in Dhurandhar 2
description: Bollywood production company Trimurti Films has filed a suit against filmmaker Aditya Dhar’s production house, B62 Studios, alleging unauthorised use of the song 'Rang De Lal' in one of the films.The dispute centres on the rights to the song, originally co-composed by Anand–Milind, with lyrics by Sameer Anjaan. It featured in the 1989 film Tridev. The track features vocals by Amit Kumar and Sapna Mukherjee. Trimurti Films claims that the song, or a version substantially similar to it, has been u
